items.question: How do I earn loyalty points?
items.answer: You earn points for every action on Cashog: completing surveys (100-500 points), installing apps (50-200 points), playing games (200-1,000 points), watching ads (5-25 points), completing offers (500-5,000 points), referring friends (1,000 points), daily login streaks (10-100 points), and completing achievements (250-2,500 points).

items.question: How many points equal $1?
items.answer: 100 points = $1 when redeeming for PayPal cash or gift cards. Higher tiers get better redemption rates through multipliers.

items.question: What are the loyalty tiers?
items.answer: Bronze (0-999 points) - 1x points. Silver (1,000-4,999 points) - 2x points. Gold (5,000-9,999 points) - 3x points. Platinum (10,000+ points) - 5x points. Higher tiers unlock better rewards and exclusive benefits.

items.question: Do points expire?
items.answer: Points never expire as long as your account remains active (at least one activity every 12 months). Platinum and Gold tier points never expire regardless of activity.

items.question: How do I redeem my points?
items.answer: Go to the Rewards section in your dashboard, choose your reward, and click 'Redeem'. Points are deducted instantly and rewards are processed within 24-48 hours.

items.question: Can I transfer points to another member?
items.answer: Yes! Platinum and Gold tier members can transfer points to other members. Bronze and Silver members cannot transfer points.

items.question: Is there a limit to how many points I can earn?
items.answer: No! There is no maximum limit. You can earn as many points as you want. Some Platinum members have earned over 100,000 points!
